location: Inside a chest at the back of a Great Coffin — a wagon hauled by two Trolls — trundling through the middle of the Consecrated Snowfield, starting southwest of the Inner Consecrated Snowfield Site of Grace.
tactics: From Inner Consecrated Snowfield grace, head southwest to intercept the moving carriage escorted by two Trolls
At night, two Night's Cavalry riders also guard the carriage — visit during daytime to skip that extra fight
The Trolls are slow and can often be avoided or outrun rather than fought head-on
Open the chest at the rear of the carriage to claim the sword
lore: Legend tells of a swordmaster clad in blue whose technique flowed like water; this blade was patterned after that style, its strong attacks stringing together into a rapid, dance-like series of strikes.

builds.name: Quality Strength/Dexterity build
builds.why: Even D/D scaling and a naturally fast, flowing moveset make it a solid pick for a balanced quality build.
